side_effects.description: Severe anxiety, felt wired and anxious
Body pain intensification, felt like someone dipped in acid and beat with baseball bat
Woke up at 10:22 PM wide awake after injection at 5:30 PM
Abnormal elevated heart rate and blood pressure with activity, pulse 144 standing in line at eye doctor
Elevated pulse rate with minimal activity, symptoms consistent with autonomic nervous system dysfunction
Brain and CNS felt 'nuked', elevated symptoms of existing traumatic brain injury

protocol_notes: Dose listed as 25 units (exact mcg unclear due to dilution confusion). Administered subcutaneously at 5:30 PM. Prescribed by Manhattan-based doctor specializing in fluoroquinolone toxicity. Obtained from legitimate compounding pharmacy in NYC. User reports high sensitivity to supplements and medications. Reports baseline chronic pain score 6-8/10. One week post-injection, experiencing persistent elevated heart rate, blood pressure, and neuropathic symptoms.
